name: Cikal School

intelligence.verdict: The word among progressive Jakarta families is that Cikal is the school doing things differently.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$4.9K – US$17K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Multiple campuses, Science laboratories, Arts studios, Libraries, Sports facilities.
